name: HMS Coquette (J 350)
events: 8 Sep 1944 Around 1400 Q/8, HrMs O 24 (Lt.Cdr. W.J. de Vries, RNN) departed New London for St. Johns, Canada. She was escorted by the British minesweeper HMS Coquette (A/Lt.Cdr. C.D. Abbott, RNR).
For the daily positions of HrMs O 24 during this passage see the map below.

14 Sep 1944 Around 0930 P/14, HrMs O 24 (Lt.Cdr. W.J. de Vries, RNN) departed St.Johns for the United Kingdom. She was escorted by the British minesweeper HMS Coquette (A/Lt.Cdr. C.D. Abbott, DSC, RNR). (1)
